commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Discord tool reply payloads through the standard reply sanitizer, adds Session History trace matching, and updates reply-delivery regression coverage.

PR surface: Source -2, Tests +16. Total +14 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence repro was run in this read-only review. Source inspection shows the current-main tool-delivery sanitizer bypass, and the linked issue provides concrete Discord message evidence from multiple agents.

target.title: fix(discord): strip internal tool traces from tool replies
target.body:
## Summary
- strip Discord front-channel tool replies with the same reply-safety sanitizer used for block/final delivery
- extend the internal-trace matcher to catch leaked `🧾 Session History:` lines alongside existing raw tool trace shapes
- add regression coverage proving raw internal tool traces are dropped while normal user-facing tool text still survives

## Testing
- pnpm vitest run extensions/discord/src/monitor/reply-delivery.test.ts extensions/discord/src/send.webhook-activity.test.ts extensions/discord/src/send.sends-basic-channel-messages.test.ts

## Issue
- closes #88341
target.author: arkyu2077
